meanings.definition: the act of making something clean
examples: he gave his shoes a good cleaning

meanings.definition: clean one's body or parts thereof, as by washing
examples: clean up before you see your grandparents

meanings.definition: purge of an ideology, bad thoughts, or sins
examples: Purgatory is supposed to cleanse you from your sins

meanings.definition: cleansing the body by washing; especially ritual washing of e.g. hands
